---
title: "Dynamic report"
output: pdf_document
params: 
  data: NA
---

```{r, include=FALSE}
options(tinytex.verbose = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# The `params` object is available in the document.
params$data
```

A plot of random points.

```{r}
knitr::kable(params$data, caption = 'A caption')
```
